# Stage 3 Reviewer Excerpt — paperC-known-fail-01

This file is a stub. Populated content (when fixture data lands in a follow-up commit on this branch before the spec PR merges to main) will be the verbatim excerpt from the external `academic-paper-reviewer` skill's Stage 3 editorial review where the hallucinated citation was caught — the citation that the in-pair Phase 6 evaluator missed during the v3.6.5 academic-paper full run.

This file is referenced by `papers[].failure_evidence` for `paperC-known-fail-01` in manifest.yaml and is the evidence that establishes the `known_failure_mode` value.
